section1.title: Introduction
section1.p1: At Crixium Digital, accessible from crixiumdigital.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Crixium Digital and how we use it.
section1.p2: If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

section2.title: Information We Collect
section2.p1: When you register on our site or contact us, as part of the process, we collect the personal information you give us such as your name, address and email address.

list.item1: Contact information such as name, email address, and phone number
list.item2: Technical information such as IP address, browser type, and operating system
list.item3: Information about how you interact with our website through cookies
list.item4: Any other information you choose to provide us through contact forms or communications

section3.title: How We Use Your Information
section3.p1: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:
section3.p2: Provide, operate, and maintain our website; improve, personalize, and expand our website; understand and analyze how you use our website; develop new products, services, features, and functionality; communicate with you to, among other things, provide you with updates and other information relating to the website, and for marketing and promotional purposes.

section4.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section4.p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit websites. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the site owners.
section4.p2: At Crixium Digital, we use the following types of cookies:

essential.title: Essential cookies (necessary)
essential.purpose: These are indispensable for the basic functioning of the website. They allow you to navigate our site and use essential features like secure areas and shopping carts.
essential.duration: Generally expire when you close your browser (session cookies).
essential.legal: These cookies are necessary for the provision of our services, so your consent is not required.

preferences.title: Preference cookies
preferences.purpose: Allow our website to remember information that changes the way the website behaves or looks, such as your preferred language or the region you are in.

statistics.title: Statistical cookies (analytics)
statistics.purpose: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
statistics.examples: We use Google Analytics to analyze the use of our site.
statistics.duration: Vary between 1 day and 2 years depending on the specific cookie.

marketing.title: Marketing cookies
marketing.purpose: Track your browsing activity on our website and other sites to deliver more relevant advertising.
marketing.examples: We use social media cookies (Facebook, Instagram) for integration and marketing purposes.
marketing.duration: Generally persist for up to 90 days.

control.title: Cookie Control
control.p1: You can manage your cookie preferences through:
control.osano: Our Osano Privacy Preferences Center: It allows you to customize your cookie preferences at any time.
control.osano_manage: You can access your cookie preferences at any time by clicking on the following button:
control.banner: Our cookie consent banner: Appears when you visit our site for the first time.
control.browser: Browser settings: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or notify you when a cookie is being sent. However, if you reject cookies, some parts of our site may not function properly.
control.more: For more information on how to manage cookies in different browsers, visit:

thirdParty.title: Third-party cookies
thirdParty.p1: Our site may contain third-party cookies, such as Google Analytics, which help us analyze how you use our website. The information generated by these cookies about your use of the site (including your IP address) will be transmitted to and stored by Google on servers in the United States. Google will use this information for the purpose of evaluating your use of the site, compiling reports on site activity for site operators, and providing other services relating to site activity and internet usage.

changes.title: Changes to our cookie policy
changes.p1: We may update our cookie policy from time to time. We encourage you to periodically review this page to stay informed about any changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please do not hesitate to contact us at contact@crixiumdigital.com

section5.title: Third-Party Privacy Policies
section5.p1: Crixium Digital's Privacy Policy does not apply to other advertisers or websites. Thus, we are advising you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information.

section6.title: GDPR Privacy Rights
section6.p1: We would like to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following: The right to access, the right to rectification, the right to erasure, the right to restrict processing, the right to data portability, the right to object, the right to not be subject to automated decision-making.

section7.title: Contact Us
section7.p1: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us:
